prompt: Create a cozy bedroom with a queen bed, two nightstands with lamps, a wooden wardrobe, and a window with curtains.
Create a modern home office with a wide desk, a monitor, ergonomic office chair, and a tall bookshelf along one wall.
Create a night market food stall lane with three vendor stalls, hanging paper lanterns, folding tables, and plastic stools.
Create a Scandinavian living room with a low sofa, a round coffee table, a floor lamp, and a large potted plant in the corner.
Create a café interior with four small round tables, matching chairs, a serving counter, and pendant lights overhead.
Create a children's bedroom with a colorful bunk bed, a toy box, a small desk with a chair, and star-shaped wall decorations.
Create a city park bench area with a wooden bench, a lamp post, a trash bin, and two large trees nearby.
Create a professional kitchen with a central prep island, stove, a large refrigerator, overhead pot rack, and stainless steel countertops.
Create a yoga studio with six rolled-out yoga mats arranged in rows, a wall mirror, and soft ambient overhead lighting.
Create a recording studio control room with a mixing console, two monitor speakers on stands, a producer's chair, and acoustic foam panels on the walls.
Create a small coffee shop with a wooden service counter, an espresso machine, three bar stools, and chalkboard menu signs.
Create a university lecture hall with five rows of tiered seating, fold-down desks, and a presentation screen at the front.
Create a Japanese zen garden with raked gravel, three large stones, a stone lantern, and a wooden bridge over a dry streambed.
Create a home gym with a barbell rack, a flat bench press, a set of dumbbells on a rack, and rubber floor tiles.
Create a hotel room with a king-size bed flanked by two nightstands, a writing desk, an armchair, and a wall-mounted TV unit.
Create a rooftop terrace with an outdoor dining table and chairs, a pergola structure, string lights, and large potted plants.
Create a fine-dining restaurant table setup with a round table, four upholstered chairs, a candle centerpiece, and a wine glass at each seat.
Create a library reading room with four rows of bookshelves, a central reading table with chairs, and a floor lamp in one corner.
Create a farmhouse kitchen with open wooden shelves, a large farmhouse sink, a butcher-block island, and rustic pendant lights.
Create a dentist examination room with a reclining dental chair, an overhead adjustable lamp arm, a small instrument tray, and a sink cabinet.
Create a cocktail bar interior with a long bar counter, six bar stools, bottle shelving behind the bar, and dim Edison bulb lighting.
Create a suburban backyard with a wooden deck, an outdoor sofa set, a BBQ grill, and a lawn area with a tree.
Create an open-plan office with eight workstations arranged in two rows, monitor stands, office chairs, and a whiteboard at one end.
Create a warehouse interior with two rows of pallet racking loaded with boxes, a forklift parked to one side, and strip lighting overhead.
Create a florist's shop with display buckets of flowers, a wrap-and-cut counter, a refrigerated display case, and hanging dried flower arrangements.
Create a community vegetable garden with four raised planting beds, a tool shed, a compost bin, and a watering can.
Create a vintage diner with a counter and rotating stools, three booth seats, a jukebox in the corner, and checkered floor tiles.
Create a master bathroom with a freestanding bathtub, a double vanity with two sinks, a frameless glass shower enclosure, and towel rails.
Create a street market entrance with an arched gate, two vendor tables with canopies on either side, and hanging string lights between the stalls.
Create a medieval tavern interior with rough wooden tables, benches, a stone fireplace, candle sconces on the walls, and a bar at the back.
Create a photography studio with a seamless paper backdrop, two studio strobes on light stands, a reflector, and a camera on a tripod.
Create a nursery with a white crib, a changing table, a rocking chair, and a colorful mobile hanging above the crib.
Create a barbershop with two barber chairs facing a mirrored wall, a waiting bench, and a barber pole near the entrance.
Create a spacecraft cockpit interior with two pilot seats, instrument panels covered in buttons and screens, overhead controls, and a large viewport window.
Create a lakeside fishing dock with wooden planks extending over water, a wooden bench, mooring posts, and fishing rods leaned against a rail.
Create a walk-in closet with double hanging rails on both sides, a central island with drawers, built-in shoe shelves, and LED strip lighting.
Create a server room with four rows of equipment racks, overhead cable trays, raised floor tiles, and industrial cooling units at one end.
Create a co-working space with hot-desks, a lounge area with a sofa and coffee table, a phone booth pod, and a communal coffee station.
Create a sauna room with two-tier wooden bench seating, a traditional sauna stove with stones, a wooden bucket and ladle, and a small frosted window.
Create a children's playground with a slide, two swings on a frame, a climbing wall, and two park benches placed nearby.
